description: hex autonomous agent system with SSE streaming, native tools, Docker workers, steering, and outcomes — feature parity with Anthropic Managed Agents

specs.description: SSE stream delivers task assignment to running agent within 1 second
specs.given: A HexFlo task is created and agent is subscribed to SSE stream
specs.when: task_assign event is emitted from SpacetimeDB
specs.then: Agent receives event via SSE stream within 1 second, including task_id, swarm_id, metadata

specs.description: hex_bash executes allowed command and returns stdout/stderr/exit code
specs.given: A Docker sandbox agent with hex_bash tool configured with allowlist ['cargo', 'npm', 'go']

specs.description: hex_bash blocks dangerous commands from allowlist
specs.given: A Docker sandbox agent with hex_bash tool
specs.then: Returns error 'Command not allowed: rm -rf / is blocked for safety'

specs.description: hex_web_search returns search results from web
specs.given: A Docker sandbox agent with hex_web_search tool
specs.when: hex_web_search({ query: 'hexagonal architecture best practices', limit: 5 }) is called
specs.then: Returns { results: [{ title, url, snippet }] } with 5 results

specs.given: A Docker sandbox agent with hex_web_fetch tool

specs.description: hex_web_fetch returns error for disallowed domains
specs.given: A Docker sandbox agent with hex_web_fetch tool restricted to allowlist ['example.com', 'github.com']
specs.then: Returns error 'Domain malicious-site.com not in allowlist'

specs.description: Docker worker receives full WorkplanStep in task metadata and executes it
specs.given: A HexFlo task created with WorkplanStep JSON embedded in description, worker Docker container running
specs.when: Worker receives task assignment via SSE
specs.then: Worker deserializes WorkplanStep, executes CodePhase, writes files to output_dir, stores result in hexflo memory

specs.description: Supervisor reads worker result from hexflo memory and updates objective state
specs.given: Worker completed and stored result in hexflo memory under {task_id}:result
specs.then: Supervisor reads result, updates ObjectiveState (CodeGenerated → CodeCompiles → TestsPass), continues pipeline

specs.description: Steering API allows sending event to running agent session
specs.given: An agent session is running with long-running task
specs.then: Agent receives event in next loop iteration, can act on new guidance without restarting

specs.description: Steering interrupt stops current tool execution and restarts with new event
specs.given: An agent session is running with tool in progress
specs.then: Current tool execution is cancelled, agent restarts with interrupt event

specs.description: Outcomes define and evaluate success criteria
specs.given: A workplan with outcomes: [{ id: 'CodeCompiles', evaluate: 'cargo check / tsc --noEmit', required: true }]
specs.then: Outcome evaluator runs compile check, streams result { id: 'CodeCompiles', status: 'passed' | 'failed', details: '...' }

specs.description: Outcome evaluation fails gracefully when required tool is missing
specs.given: A workplan with outcome evaluate: 'go build' but Go is not installed in container
specs.then: Returns { id: 'CodeCompiles', status: 'skipped', reason: 'tool go not found' } (not 'failed')

specs.description: Environment API creates container from template
specs.given: hex-nexus is running with Docker available

specs.description: Session API creates session with agent and environment
specs.given: An environment exists with container running
specs.when: POST /api/sessions { agent_id: '<id>', environment_id: '<env-id>', system_prompt: 'You are a coder' }
specs.then: Returns { session_id: '<uuid>', status: 'created' } and agent begins polling for tasks

specs.description: Session SSE streaming provides real-time status updates
specs.given: A session is created and client subscribes to /api/sessions/{id}/stream
specs.then: Client receives SSE event: { event: 'task_complete', session_id, task_id, result: '...' }

specs.description: Full autonomous pipeline: workplan → Docker worker → SSE → outcome → complete without human intervention
specs.given: A workplan with 3 steps, Docker workers available, SSE streaming enabled
specs.then: Steps execute autonomously: workers pull tasks via SSE, execute code, pass outcomes, swarm completes without human intervention
